summary: The implementation successfully delivers all three requirements: backend test profile generation (REQ-1), backend verification with console logging (REQ-2), and a frontend Test Mode page (REQ-3). All acceptance criteria appear satisfied based on the diff evidence.

hallucinated_features.description: Migration module (backend/migration.mo) that converts old wellness report data structures to new format with medical history and user answers
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest does not mention data migration, schema evolution, or backwards compatibility requirements. This appears to be infrastructure work unrelated to the test mode feature.
